title: Weapons Arsenal
description: Adds a variety of random weapons to destroy your world and friends
body:
This mod adds a variety of weapons!
Note: Nothing in this mod requires ammunition of any kind.
## Minigun
A minigun (Obiously) that shoots arrows at an alarmingly fast rate
## Arrow staff
A staff that shoots arrows on click
## Egg staff
A staff that shoots eggs on click
## Dagger
A small weapon, with a high attack speed and low damage
## Missile launcher
Shoots TNT
## Upgraded missile launcher
Shoots bigger TNT
## Ultimate missile launcher
Shoots massive TNT
## Annihilator
Instantly despawns any entity
## Warden pickaxe
Mines any breakable block incredibly quickly
## Dragon staff
Shoots dragon fireballs
## Croissant
A croissant that can be eaten infinitely
## Croissant sword
A sword that can be eaten infinitely
## Lightning sword
A sword that summons lightning on hit, dangerous
## Fire staff
A staff that shoots fireballs
## Yeeter
A brick that sends mobs into the sky
## Warden core
An item used to craft warden pickaxe
## Web sword
A sword that will trap any enemy in a web
## Flamethrower
A flamethrower that shoots fire charges very quickly
## Chicken nugget
A nugget that can be eaten very quickly, providing decent saturation
## Hammer
A tool with high damage, also functions as pickaxe, made with anvil
## Dirt sword
A cheap sword, with 3 damage, made with 2 dirt blocks
## TNT Sword
A sword that explodes on contact, use with extreme caution!!!
## Broadsword
A big, powerful and slow sword


And finally,

# Airstrike gun
A gun that, on right click while looking at any block at any distance, summons a falling TNT, on top of that block, that explodes on contact!

# Automated airstrike gun
Same as above, but no need for repetitive clicking, just hold and enjoy!
